jobs.title: Software Developer
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Build React and TypeScript product features, integrate REST APIs, write unit tests, and collaborate with product and design teams using Git.

jobs.title: Full Stack Developer
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Develop Node.js services and SQL-backed applications, maintain CI pipelines, and ship customer-facing features with Docker and AWS.

jobs.title: Software Developer

jobs.title: Platform Developer
jobs.descriptionSnippet: Own API integrations, cloud deployment workflows, and monitoring for a growing platform. Experience with Git, Docker, and SQL is required.

jobs.title: Backend Software Developer
